news.t: Climate change will be a 'really big' focus for ESG investors in 2021, market analyst says
Sustainable investment funds just surpassed $1 trillion for the first time on record
Trump environmental policies, Nike's Kaepernick campaign among catalysts driving millions into ESG funds
These were the most impactful ETFs of 2019, industry leaders say
Sustainable investing is taking Wall Street by storm—but there's plenty of room for growth in ETFs

holdings.infoBox: SUSL is an equity ETF with a total of 268 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.08%, Microsoft at 8.17%, Alphabet at 6.39%, Alphabet at 5.04%, and Tesla at 3.35%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG MSCI USA Leaders ETF (SUSL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Extended ESG Leaders index. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap firms with the highest ESG ratings, weighted by market-cap within each sector buckets. SUSL was launched on May 7, 2019 and is issued by BlackRock.
